name: Solid.SolidCreationTypeEnum
summary: The creation type of the solid.

enum_values.name: RAW
enum_values.summary: The solid is created without any boolean operations.

enum_values.name: FITTED
enum_values.summary: The solid is created with fittings.

enum_values.name: NORMAL
enum_values.summary: The solid is created including all cutting and fitting operations.

enum_values.name: HIGH_ACCURACY
enum_values.summary: The solid is created as normal with an exact profile cross section.

enum_values.name: PLANECUTTED
enum_values.summary: The solid is created with fittings and cut planes.

enum_values.name: NORMAL_WITHOUT_EDGECHAMFERS
enum_values.summary: The solid is created including all cutting and fitting operations without edge chamfers.

enum_values.name: NORMAL_WITHOUT_WELDPREPS
enum_values.summary: The solid is created including all cutting and fitting operations without weld prepping.
